seoTitle: Hawun Power Solutions | Industrial & Medical Applications
seoDescription: Explore Hawun power solutions for industrial automation, medical equipment, and telecommunications. Complete power solutions with technical support from authorized distributor.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Hawun power solution?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right power solution involves defining your application requirements, input power source, output specifications, isolation needs, and safety certifications. Our FAE team can help assess your requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for power solution assessment.

faqs.question: What support does BeiLuo provide?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive support: Technical consultation, application engineering, prototype support, and production support. Our FAE team guides you through the entire design process.

solutions.name: Industrial Power Solution
solutions.title: Industrial Power Solution
solutions.description: Reliable power solution for industrial automation and control systems
solutions.longDescription: The Industrial Power Solution from Hawun provides reliable isolated power for PLCs, sensors, and control systems. Features wide temperature range, high efficiency, and comprehensive protection.

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable power for factory floor PLCs in harsh environment
customerCases.solution: Implemented HB series AC-DC modules with wide temperature range
customerCases.result: Zero failures in 3 years of 24/7 operation

faeInsights.insight: Industrial power design requires attention to temperature, isolation, and EMC. Always verify actual operating temperature and provide adequate margin.
faeInsights.logic: Design process: Define requirements, select appropriate modules, verify thermal design, test under actual conditions.

solutions.name: Medical Power Solution
solutions.title: Medical Power Solution
solutions.description: Medical-grade power solution meeting safety standards for healthcare equipment
solutions.longDescription: The Medical Power Solution from Hawun provides isolated power for medical devices with 2xMOPP patient protection and compliance to IEC 60601-1 medical safety standards.

customerCases.challenge: Needed compact, medical-grade power with low leakage
customerCases.solution: Implemented HA series with enhanced isolation
customerCases.result: Passed all medical safety certifications, product in production

faeInsights.insight: Medical power requires special attention to isolation, leakage current, and safety certifications. Always verify compliance with applicable medical standards.
faeInsights.logic: Medical design: Identify patient contact level, determine isolation requirements, select certified modules, verify leakage current.

solutions.name: Telecom Power Solution
solutions.title: Telecom Power Solution
solutions.description: High-efficiency power solution for telecommunications infrastructure
solutions.longDescription: The Telecom Power Solution from Hawun provides efficient power conversion for telecom equipment with high reliability and wide input range for battery backup systems.
benefits: Wide input range for battery backup

customerCases.challenge: Needed efficient, reliable power for 24/7 network equipment
customerCases.solution: Implemented HE series DC-DC with parallel redundancy
customerCases.result: 99.999% uptime achieved, reduced cooling costs by 15%

faeInsights.insight: Telecom power requires high efficiency and reliability. Parallel operation provides redundancy for critical applications.
faeInsights.logic: Telecom design: Calculate power needs, plan for redundancy, select high-efficiency modules, verify thermal design.
bestPractices: Use N+1 redundancy for critical systems
